recommendations.title: Spellbound
recommendations.overview: When a powerful spell turns her parents into giant monsters, a teenage princess must journey into the wild to reverse the curse before it's too late.

recommendations.title: Shrek
recommendations.overview: It ain't easy bein' green -- especially if you're a likable (albeit smelly) ogre named Shrek. On a mission to retrieve a gorgeous princess from the clutches of a fire-breathing dragon, Shrek teams up with an unlikely compatriot -- a wisecracking donk

recommendations.title: Pokémon Detective Pikachu
recommendations.overview: In a world where people collect pocket-size monsters (Pokémon) to do battle, a boy comes across an intelligent monster who seeks to be a detective.

recommendations.title: Shrek in the Swamp Karaoke Dance Party
recommendations.overview: Shrek and his friends enjoy themselves with some Karaoke partying.

recommendations.title: Post Grad
recommendations.overview: Ryden Malby has a master plan. Graduate college, get a great job, hang out with her best friend and find the perfect guy. But her plan spins hilariously out of control when she’s forced to move back home with her eccentric family.

recommendations.title: Gulliver's Travels
recommendations.overview: Travel writer Lemuel Gulliver takes an assignment in Bermuda, but ends up on the island of Liliput, where he towers over its tiny citizens.

recommendations.title: Klaus
recommendations.overview: A selfish postman and a reclusive toymaker form an unlikely friendship, delivering joy to a cold, dark town that desperately needs it.

recommendations.title: Goosebumps
recommendations.overview: After moving to a small town, Zach Cooper finds a silver lining when he meets next door neighbor Hannah, the daughter of bestselling Goosebumps series author R.L. Stine. When Zach unintentionally unleashes real monsters from their manuscripts and the

recommendations.title: Monsters vs Aliens
recommendations.overview: When Susan Murphy is unwittingly clobbered by a meteor full of outer space gunk on her wedding day, she mysteriously grows to 49-feet-11-inches. The military jumps into action and captures Susan, secreting her away to a covert government compound. Sh

recommendations.title: Under the Boardwalk
recommendations.overview: Two crabs embark on an epic journey to get home after a storm sweeps them away. Their courage soon unites their families, paving the way for great summers to come.
